perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light pink top and white skirt, stands in the aisle of a warehouse store and speaks excitedly to the camera. (2) She picks up a green two-pack of TheraBreath mouthwash from a shelf and holds it forward to show the audience, gesturing with her free hand. (3) The camera cuts to close-ups of the product and price tags while the woman continues to explain its features; a graphic of a pink bottle appears briefly to illustrate a point.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music begins immediately alongside a female voice speaking Mandarin Chinese with high enthusiasm. (2) The music maintains a constant tempo as the woman describes the product's benefits, such as being non-alcoholic and dentist-recommended. (3) Light 'pop' and 'whoosh' sound effects are heard occasionally as text graphics appear on screen, with the vocal remaining dominant until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom center, synchronized with the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful variety-show style captions appear throughout: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', '美國超夯!' (US Super Popular!), '最新王者漱口' (Latest King of Mouthwash), '大家都在買' (Everyone is buying), and '$699' to highlight the price and deal value.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Demonstration -> Price/Value Proposition -> Closing Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to camera
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light pink puff-sleeve blouse and a white textured skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse retail environment with tall metal shelves stacked with bulk goods like wet wipes and personal care products.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even industrial lighting typical of a large retail store.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between spoken segments over a continuous BGM track

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Price Benefit -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to drive consumer action by highlighting the new availability and competitive pricing of TheraBreath mouthwash at Costco. It synthesizes the excitement of finding a 'cult favorite' product (the US-popular brand) with practical shopping advice (buy it here to save on shipping and unit cost) through a high-energy vlog format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product display, price breakdown, and direct recommendation to purchase at a specific retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of vibrant, floating text boxes and variety-show style emotional cues.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious but quality-seeking consumers who follow international health and beauty trends.
